about.bio1: I am a full-stack developer focused on building high-quality web applications. Over the past few years, I have participated in the development of multiple large-scale projects, covering various domains from e-commerce to enterprise management systems.
about.bio2: I am passionate about learning new technologies and actively contribute to the open-source community. I believe technology not only improves efficiency but, more importantly, creates value and enhances user experience.
